caveats: Both judges are DeepSeek (same provider) -> validated:false; a RESULTS.md run needs >=2 provider families.
deepseek-chat both generates answers and judges (self-grading risk).

abstain-rubric: confident refutation of a fictional premise is scored as non-abstention, which can understate the raw model on fictional-premise controls; the grounded system's target behavior is uniform fail-closed abstention. The unambiguous contrast is on RETRACTED real facts, where raw asserts the stale fact and grounded abstains.
